
  # Create wireframes for pages

  This is a code bundle for Create wireframes for pages. The original project is available at https://www.figma.com/design/zuGdAhiH67nLe6dR9QEM2T/Create-wireframes-for-pages.

  ## Running the code

  Run `npm i` to install the dependencies.

  Run `npm run dev` to start the development server.
